# task\-phase9\-normalize\-timestamps — Normalize or document legacy timestamp formats
status: done  priority: 2  scope: scope-core
readiness: not_eligible  reason: status_done

Review legacy ledger records that use UTC\-Z timestamps while newer records use local offset timestamps\. Decide whether to normalize old records or explicitly document compatibility\. If normalizing, preserve semantic instants and avoid touching unrelated fields\.

## Acceptance
- All timestamp records are reviewed for mixed UTC\-Z and local\-offset formatting\.
- Either legacy timestamps are normalized to the current convention or the compatibility decision is documented in docs/roadmap\.md or an ADR\.
- No unrelated ledger fields are changed during normalization\.
- waystation validate is clean after the change\.
- bun test, typecheck, biome check, and rebuilt binary smoke checks are green if code changes are made\.
